cities.name: Nairobi
cities.political_enabler: Devolution created county accountability — not yet leveraged for enforcement

cities.name: Medellin
cities.key_intervention: Urban acupuncture + community co-design of drainage
cities.political_enabler: Mayor Fajardo bet political capital on informal settlement upgrading
transferable: Community technicians trained as flood wardens
Green corridors doubling as social infrastructure

cities.name: Rotterdam
cities.key_intervention: Delta Works + water squares + climate adaptation levy
cities.political_enabler: Existential national threat created 70-year political consensus
transferable: Water squares concept adaptable at low cost

cities.name: Singapore
cities.key_intervention: ABC Waters programme — every drain a feature not a hazard
cities.political_enabler: Single planning authority with enforcement power over all land use
transferable: Strict riparian buffer enforcement from day one

cities.name: Dhaka
cities.political_enabler: None — enforcement gap is structural and political
transferable: Warning: canal encroachment trajectory mirrors Nairobi if unaddressed

cities.name: Jakarta
cities.key_intervention: Normalization programme — river widening with resettlement
cities.political_enabler: Governor Ahok's political will + World Bank support (gains partially reversed)
transferable: Resettlement with replacement housing is feasible at scale
River normalization creates riparian compliance over time
